mapper.select:
SELECT r.restaurant_id AS restaurantId, r.name, r.category, r.address, r.region, r.main_menu AS mainMenu, r.main_image AS mainImage,
COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rv.rating), 1), 0) AS rating, COUNT(rv.review_id) AS reviewCount,
r.lat, r.lng, r.tel, r.open_time AS openTime, r.homepage, r.description FROM restaurants r LEFT JOIN reviews rv ON r.restaurant_id = rv.restaurant_id GROUP BY r.restaurant_id, r.name, r.category, r.address, r.region, r.main_menu, r.main_image, r.lat, r.lng, r.tel, r.open_time, r.homepage, r.description ORDER BY r.restaurant_id DESC

SELECT r.restaurant_id AS restaurantId, r.name, r.category, r.address, r.region, r.main_menu AS mainMenu, r.main_image AS mainImage,
COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rv.rating), 1), 0) AS rating, COUNT(rv.review_id) AS reviewCount,
r.lat, r.lng, r.tel, r.open_time AS openTime, r.homepage, r.description FROM restaurants r LEFT JOIN reviews rv ON r.restaurant_id = rv.restaurant_id WHERE r.restaurant_id = #{restaurantId} GROUP BY r.restaurant_id, r.name, r.category, r.address, r.region, r.main_menu, r.main_image, r.lat, r.lng, r.tel, r.open_time, r.homepage, r.description
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO restaurants ( name, category, address, region, main_menu, main_image, rating, review_count, lat, lng, tel, open_time, homepage, description ) VALUES ( #{name}, #{category}, #{address}, #{region}, #{mainMenu}, #{mainImage}, #{rating}, #{reviewCount}, #{lat}, #{lng}, #{tel}, #{openTime}, #{homepage}, #{description} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS reviewCount, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(rating), 1), 0) AS avgRating FROM reviews WHERE restaurant_id = #{restaurantId}
